prompt: I have a deep learning textbook (Goodfellow et al.) in my course_material/ directory. I want to set up a learning project with a full curriculum. Use hybrid NotebookLM mode.

assertions.text: Skill triggers: Claude invokes or follows the scaffold-project skill
Project structure: Claude mentions creating course_material/, progress.md, curriculum_map.yaml
NLM hybrid mode configured: Claude sets nlm_mode: hybrid in curriculum_map.yaml
meta.yaml stubs: Claude explains it will create a meta.yaml per lesson with required fields (name, description, status, depends)
Jupyter verification: Claude mentions verifying Jupyter MCP connection
